pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh define and use this exact directory path.
Executing pytest collection on the test file defined in setup_task.sh confirms exactly 12 tests are created.
verifier.py implements a scoring logic that explicitly checks if the score is >= 85.

privileged_info_summary: The PyCharm project directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/shop_scraper. The project contains exactly 12 pytest tests, including parametrized robustness tests that use synthetic HTML data to prevent hardcoding. To pass the task, the agent's solution must achieve a score of at least 85 points according to the logic in verifier.py.
